title: High Frequency vs Smart Money: Who Really Moves Markets?
description: Think HFT algo bots run the show? Think again. Here's what actually moves price — and how smart money uses order blocks and fair value gaps to trap retail traders every single day.
script: 6 months of losses. Then I learned ONE thing. HFT doesn't move markets. Smart money does. HFT reacts to price. Smart money CREATES price. They build order blocks. They leave fair value gaps. On purpose. 3 signs smart money just moved: Liquidity sweep above highs. Price drops into a fair value gap. Strong rejection candle forms. Stop chasing HFT noise. Hunt the order blocks. That's where smart money lives. That's your edge. Want setups like this daily? Follow R2F Trading. Link in bio.
